definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL PT: We need accountability in government.]

definitions.usage_context_en: El hecho o la condición de ser responsable por las propias acciones.

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He showed his appreciation.]

definitions.usage_context_en: Reconocimiento y disfrute de las buenas cualidades de alguien o algo.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Recognition and enjoyment of the good qualities of someone or something.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Do you need assistance?]

definitions.usage_context_en: La acción de ayudar a alguien con un trabajo o tarea.

definitions.usage_context_en: El estado o cualidad de estar dedicado a una causa, actividad o persona.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: The state or quality of being dedicated to a cause, activity, or person.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL PT: We need to reach a compromise.]

definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: An agreement or settlement of a dispute that is reached by each side making concessions.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL PT: His conduct was unprofessional.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN PT PARA HABLANTES DE ES]
definitions.usage_context_en: La manera en que una persona se comporta, especialmente en un lugar o situación particular.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: The manner in which a person behaves, especially in a particular place or situation.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I have a consultation with the doctor.]

definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: A meeting with an expert, such as a doctor, in order to seek advice.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL PT: The decision caused a controversy.]

definitions.usage_context_en: Desacuerdo público prolongado o debate acalorado.

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Good coordination is required.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN PT PARA HABLANTES DE ES]
definitions.usage_context_en: La organización de los diferentes elementos de un cuerpo o actividad compleja para permitirles trabajar juntos eficazmente.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: The organization of the different elements of a complex body or activity so as to enable them to work together effectively.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He does not accept criticism.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN PT PARA HABLANTES DE ES]

definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: The expression of disapproval of someone or something based on perceived faults or mistakes.]

definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN PT PARA HABLANTES DE ES]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL PT: The bridge needs a new support.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL PT: It's a family tradition.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN PT PARA HABLANTES DE ES]
definitions.usage_context_en: Una costumbre o creencia establecida desde hace tiempo y transmitida de una generación a otra.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: A long-established custom or belief passed down from one generation to another.]
